title: Vibe Config
description: Configuration for Vibe Master auto-compaction and other project settings.

contextWindowLimit.description: Default token limit for the LLM context window.

compactionThreshold.description: Fraction of context window that triggers auto-compaction (0.0–1.0).

preservedTurns.description: Number of recent conversation turns to preserve during compaction.

model.description: Current active model name (used to look up modelOverrides).

modelOverrides.description: Per-model overrides for context window settings.
